en: When he came down from the mountain, great crowds followed him.
zh: 耶穌下了山，許多人跟隨著他。

en: And behold, a leper came to him and knelt before him, saying, "Lord, if you will, you can make me clean."
zh: 有一個患痲風的人前來向他跪拜，說：“主啊！如果你肯，必能使我潔淨。”

en: And Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, saying, "I will; be clean." And immediately his leprosy was cleansed.
zh: 耶穌伸手摸他，說：“我肯，你潔淨了吧！”他的痲風立刻潔淨了。

en: And Jesus said to him, "See that you say nothing to anyone, but go, show yourself to the priest and offer the gift that Moses commanded, for a proof to them."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“你千萬不可告訴別人，只要去給祭司檢查，並且照著摩西所規定的獻上供物，好向大家作證。”

en: When he entered Capernaum, a centurion came forward to him, appealing to him,
zh: 耶穌到了迦百農，有一個百夫長前來懇求他，

en: "Lord, my servant is lying paralyzed at home, suffering terribly."
zh: 說：“主啊！我的僕人癱瘓了，躺在家裡非常痛苦。”

en: And he said to him, "I will come and heal him."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“我去醫治他。”

en: But the centurion replied, "Lord, I am not worthy to have you come under my roof, but only say the word, and my servant will be healed.
zh: 百夫長回答：“主啊，要你到舍下來，實在不敢當。只要你說一句話，我的僕人就必好了。

en: For I too am a man under authority, with soldiers under me. And I say to one, 'Go,' and he goes, and to another, 'Come,' and he comes, and to my servant, 'Do this,' and he does it."
zh: 我自己是在別人的權下，也有兵在我以下；我對這個說‘去！’他就去，對另一個說‘來！’他就來；對僕人說‘作這個！’他就作。”

en: When Jesus heard this, he marveled and said to those who followed him, "Truly, I tell you, with no one in Israel have I found such faith.
zh: 耶穌聽了，就很驚奇，對跟隨的人說：“我實在告訴你們，這樣的信心，我在以色列中從來沒有見過。

en: I tell you, many will come from east and west and recline at table with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the kingdom of heaven,
zh: 我告訴你們，必有許多人從東從西來到，和亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各在天國裡一起吃飯。

en: while the sons of the kingdom will be thrown into the outer darkness. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth."
zh: 但本來要承受天國的人，反被丟在外面黑暗裡，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。”

en: And to the centurion Jesus said, "Go; let it be done for you as you have believed." And the servant was healed at that very moment.
zh: 於是耶穌對百夫長說：“回去吧！事情必照你所信的給你成就。”他的僕人就在那時痊愈了。

en: And when Jesus entered Peter's house, he saw his mother-in-law lying sick with a fever.
zh: 耶穌來到彼得家裡，看見他的岳母發燒，病在床上。

en: He touched her hand, and the fever left her, and she rose and began to serve him.
zh: 耶穌一摸她的手，熱就退了；她就起來服事耶穌。

en: That evening they brought to him many who were oppressed by demons, and he cast out the spirits with a word and healed all who were sick.
zh: 到了黃昏，有些人帶了許多被鬼附的人來見耶穌，他只用一句話就把污靈趕出去，並且醫好了所有患病的人。

en: This was to fulfill what was spoken by the prophet Isaiah: "He took our illnesses and bore our diseases."
zh: 這樣正應驗了以賽亞先知所說的： “他親自除去我們的軟弱， 擔當我們的疾病。”

en: Now when Jesus saw a great crowd around him, he gave orders to go over to the other side.
zh: 耶穌看見許多人圍著他，就吩咐往對岸去。

en: And a scribe came up and said to him, "Teacher, I will follow you wherever you go."
zh: 有一位經學家前來對他說：“老師，你無論往哪裡去，我都要跟從你！”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Foxes have holes, and birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head."
zh: 耶穌回答：“狐狸有洞，天空的飛鳥有窩，但人子卻沒有棲身 的地方。”

en: Another of the disciples said to him, "Lord, let me first go and bury my father."
zh: 另一個門徒對他說：“主啊！請准我先回去安葬我的父親吧。”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Follow me, and leave the dead to bury their own dead."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“跟從我吧！讓死人去埋葬他們的死人。”

en: And when he got into the boat, his disciples followed him.
zh: 耶穌上了船，門徒跟著他。

en: And behold, there arose a great storm on the sea, so that the boat was being swamped by the waves; but he was asleep.
zh: 忽然海上起了狂風，甚至船都被波濤掩蓋，但耶穌卻睡著了。

en: And they went and woke him, saying, "Save us, Lord; we are perishing."
zh: 他們走來把他叫醒，說：“主啊！救命啊！我們沒命了！”

en: And he said to them, "Why are you afraid, O you of little faith?" Then he rose and rebuked the winds and the sea, and there was a great calm.
zh: 耶穌卻對他們說：“小信的人哪！為甚麼害怕呢？”他就起來斥責風和海，風浪就完全平靜了。

en: And the men marveled, saying, "What sort of man is this, that even winds and sea obey him?"
zh: 眾人都驚奇，說：“這是甚麼人，連風和海也聽從他？”

en: And when he came to the other side, to the country of the Gadarenes, two demon-possessed men met him, coming out of the tombs, so fierce that no one could pass that way.
zh: 耶穌過到對岸加大拉人的地區，遇見兩個被鬼附著的人從墓地出來；他們十分兇暴，甚至沒有人敢從那條路經過。

en: And behold, they cried out, "What have you to do with us, O Son of God? Have you come here to torment us before the time?"
zh: 他們喊叫：“ 神的兒子，我們跟你有甚麼關係呢？時候還沒有到，你就來這裡叫我們受苦嗎？”

en: Now a herd of many pigs was feeding at some distance from them.
zh: 那時遠遠有一大群豬正在吃東西。

en: And the demons begged him, saying, "If you cast us out, send us away into the herd of pigs."
zh: 那些鬼就求耶穌，說：“如果要趕我們出來，就准我們進到豬群裡去吧。”

en: And he said to them, "Go." So they came out and went into the pigs, and behold, the whole herd rushed down the steep bank into the sea and drowned in the waters.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“出去吧！”他們就出來，進了豬群。那一群豬忽然闖下山崖，掉在海裡淹死了。

en: The herdsmen fled, and going into the city they told everything, especially what had happened to the demon-possessed men.
zh: 放豬的人逃進城裡，把被鬼附的人的遭遇和一切事情，都報告出來。

en: And behold, all the city came out to meet Jesus, and when they saw him, they begged him to leave their region.
zh: 全城的居民都出來要見耶穌，看見了他，就求他離開他們的地區。
